title: Flying Romeos
writer: John W. Conway, Sidney Lazarus, John McDermott
actors: Charles Murray, George Sidney, Fritzi Ridgeway
plot: Cohen (Sidney) and Cohan (Murray) are partners in a barber shop, always squabbling with each other, both being smitten by their beautiful manicure girl. She is fascinated only with aviators, so, determined to win her, both take up...
